testcases.input: obj = {"x": 5, "y": 42} Output: false Explanation: The object has 2 key-value pairs so it is not empty.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: The object has 2 key-value pairs so it is not empty.

testcases.input: obj = {} Output: true Explanation: The object doesn't have any key-value pairs so it is empty.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: The object doesn't have any key-value pairs so it is empty.

testcases.input: obj = [null, false, 0] Output: false Explanation: The array has 3 elements so it is not empty.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: The array has 3 elements so it is not empty.
